allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking gives non-linear-dynamics the whole-system frame needed to see interrelationships instead of isolated events.
Feedback-loops supply the concrete reinforcing and balancing structure that makes non-linear dynamics decision-useful.
Second-order-thinking helps non-linear-dynamics map the dominoes that unfold after an initial intervention.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Non-linear-dynamics conflicts with risk-vs-uncertainty when leaders act as if unstable feedback systems were just ordinary forecastable risk.
structured_tensions.source_quote: too much uncertainty in potential outcomes
